title: Political gain operation
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Political gain operations''' or '''PGOs''' were [[Terrorist/Legends|terror]] tactics used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] on worlds where local support wavered between the Empire and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Special [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] squads would engage in terrorist activities, causing the local populace to appeal to the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] for help. Imperial reinforcements would arrive and arrest all known or suspected Rebels, at which point the attacks would cease, making the locals believed that the Empire had saved them from Rebel terrorists.
